description: Created by campaign-launch skill. Records what was launched, when, and learning-phase guardrails. Do not edit during learning phase unless you understand the consequences (resets Meta's algorithm optimization).

learning_phase.notes: Meta needs ~50 Lead events and 14 days to exit learning phase. During this window: no audience changes, no budget changes >20%, no creative rotation unless an ad is clearly failing (CTR <0.005 after $50 spend). Pausing underperformers is still allowed.
